description:
Authors: Wei, J. and Wang, X. and Schuurmans, D. and Bosma, M. and Ichter, B. and Xia, F. and Chi, E. and Le, Q. and Zhou, D.
Title: Chain-of-thought prompting elicits reasoning in large language models
Conference/Book: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
Year: 2022
Volume: 35
reason: Multiple authoritative sources (Semantic Scholar, CrossRef, arXiv, OpenAlex) confirm the paper's existence with matching title, authors, year, and venue. The paper is highly cited (over 17k citations) and well-documented in the literature.
